Course Equivalence Mapping
Map old-batch / old-curriculum subjects to new-batch equivalents вАФ essential when a year-back or sem-back student rejoins a revised syllabus
вДєпЄП
How course equivalence works
When the curriculum changes between batches, a subject a student already cleared (old code) may be replaced by a renamed/restructured subject (new code) in the revised syllabus. Map them here so credit already earned is correctly carried forward instead of being asked to repeat the course.
Old-PRC cleared courses
Drag a course onto its new-PRC equivalent вЖТ
New-PRC curriculum вАФ drop targets
Drop an old course on a row to record the equivalence
Old Subject (Old Batch)New Subject (New Batch)Credit Match Mapping TypeApplies ToActions
Semester Load Balancer
Upload or select current-semester and backlog (previous-semester) courses side by side to balance combined credit load
вЪЦпЄП
How the balancer works
Upload (or pick manually) the courses planned for the current semester and the backlog / previous-semester courses still pending. The balancer adds up both credit loads, compares the combined total against your configured maximum per-semester limit, and shows the equivalence gap if any of the backlog subjects have an old вЖТ new curriculum mapping.

Log Re-Attempt / Back Paper Result
Logging an attempt with a passing grade (D or above) will mark the subject as Completed and clear the backlog. Logging an F keeps it as an open backlog with the attempt recorded in history.

University Rules вАФ Classification & Award
% = (CGPA вИТ offset) √Ч multiplier  ¬Ј  e.g. √Ч10 / offset 0, or √Ч10 / offset 0.75 вАФ set as per the PU regulation handbook.

рЯС• Student Profiles

рЯУШ User Guide вАФ Presidency University Credit Management System
Readmission / Equivalence Workflow (Annexure-A)
  1. вЪЩ Settings вЖТ University Rules вАФ set Readmitted Into Semester (e.g. Sem 7 вЖТ old Sem 1вАУ6 are considered) and basket minimums.
  2. Course Equivalence вЖТ рЯІ© Mapping Board вЖТ рЯУ§ Upload plan вАФ load the new (readmitted) PRC (.xlsx/.csv/.json). The PU master grid works directly: Roman semesters, full basket names, and a Programme + Batch picker appear automatically.
  3. рЯУС Marks Sheets page вАФ Sem 1вАУ8 slots plus unlimited Summer/Make-Up/supplementary slots for grade cards as PDF, Excel, CSV, text or pasted text; the PDF opens on upload for side-by-side checking; parsed courses commit to the pool (auto-mapped) or merge into the register. Or: рЯУ§ Upload old courses вАФ load the student's old-PRC course list (with grades). Select all semester marks sheets at once вАФ semesters are read from a column, "Semester N" rows, or the file name, grades set the status, and the mapping is marked automatically. F/NP chips are marked red.
  4. Drag chips onto new-PRC rows to record equivalences. Completed вЖТ transferred (B); completed onto a Sem вЙ• readmission course вЖТ Table III exemption (D); failed/NP mapped вЖТ Table II (C); left unmapped вЖТ Table V removal.
  5. рЯПЫ Committee Report вАФ live Annexure-A Tables IвАУVII with the (B+C+D+E+F) вЙ• A check ¬Ј Table I rows accept drag-and-drop directly (chip strip on top) with inline вЬХ unmap ¬Ј рЯПЫ Committee Report (Excel) exports all 8 sheets.
Pages
Dashboard вАФ KPIs, CGPA, progress ¬Ј Subject Register вАФ add/edit/search, Excel import, NP status, baskets, L-T-P-C ¬Ј Planner Board вАФ drag courses between semesters with credit-cap warnings ¬Ј Backlogs вАФ attempts history ¬Ј Course Equivalence вАФ Mapping Board / Records / Committee Report ¬Ј Sem Load Balancer ¬Ј Analytics вАФ SGPA trend ¬Ј Requirements вАФ Degree Audit, Classification & %, Target-CGPA calculator, рЯЦ® Transcript.
Data & Offline
Everything runs 100% offline вАФ Excel engine and fonts are embedded; data auto-saves in this browser ("вЧП saved"). Use вЪЩ Settings вЖТ Data to export/restore a .json backup, load the built-in Annexure-A sample (20211CSE0198), or reset. Copy the single HTML file to any machine вАФ nothing to install.
Shortcuts
Ctrl+Z undo ¬Ј Ctrl+Y / Ctrl+Shift+Z redo ¬Ј / search subjects ¬Ј Esc close dialogs ¬Ј рЯМЩ dark mode toggle in the topbar.
